title: potentilla × vanzhilii
intro: Potentilla × vanzhilii, also known as the hybrid potentilla, is a cross between Potentilla fragarioides and Potentilla discolor, a type of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Potentilla × vanzhilii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Potentilla × vanzhilii typically involve drying the leaves and roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
